title: Zendaya Wears $35 Spider-Man T-Shirt to ‘Brand New Day’ Fan Event in Paris: ‘Style Doesn’t Always Have to Cost a Fortune’
content:
ByAngelique Jackson

AZendayapress cycle usually means one couture — and project-themed — look after another. But for her latest stop on the “Spider-Man: Brand New Day” world tour, on Wednesday in Paris, the Emmy winner rocked a simple, oversized black t-shirt with the webslinger on the front.

Of course, Zendaya and her longtime stylist Law Roach paired the vintage graphic tee with white Christian Louboutin pumps — it is a red carpet photocall, after all — but the real news is that Roach copped the look on eBay for $34.99.

“Style doesn’t always have to cost a fortune,” Roach wrote on his Instagram stories, posting a screenshot of the eBay listing for the shirt. (Whoever sold that pre-owned 2XL tee likely cannot believe on whose super-stylish back it ended up.)

Over the years, Zendaya and Roach have crafted major red carpet fashion moments, including making Met Gala magic in 2019 with a Tommy Hilfiger gown that transformed Zendaya into Cinderella; sourcing a skintight metallic Thierry Mugler bodysuit (fall/winter ’95) for the “Dune: Part Two” premiere; her troupe of tenniscore outfits for “Challengers,” including custom Loewe and Lacoste looks; and the many spider-web-adorned styles for the four “Spider-Man” movies over the last decade.

Most recently, the duo told a bridal-themed story for her wedding dramedy, “The Drama” — recycling thewhite Vivienne Westwood gown Zendaya first wore to the 2015 Oscarsas “something old” and culminating with a black-and-blue feathered Schiaparelli ballgown, fresh off the runway, as “something blue.” Zendaya and her “Spider-Man” Tom Holland alsogot marriedduring this juncture, but the world may never see what the uber fashionable — and uber private — couple wore when they walked down the aisle.

Zendaya kicked off the “Brand New Day” press tour in Madrid with a fire-engine red Ernest Naranjo dress and a black Christian Cowan gown. In Amsterdam, she opted for a dramatic McQueen opera coat and dress with metallic floral embroidery and a black-and-red embellished Louis Vuitton look. Then, in Berlin, she rocked a custom Black leather Louis Vuitton crop top and skirt. For Rome, Zendaya went archival, wearing a stunning beaded spiderweb dress from Giorgio Armani (spring ’90) and a shimmering Versace crop top and skirt (fall ’97).

Holland and Zendaya star in the film, from Sony and Marvel Studios, in U.S. theaters on July 31.
title_zh: 辛黛亞(Zendaya)在巴黎的「全新一天(Brand New Day)」粉絲活動中穿著價值35美元的蜘蛛人T恤，表示：「風格不一定要花費一大筆錢。」
content_zh:
由安潔莉克·傑克森(Angelique Jackson)報導

Zendaya(辛黛拉)的宣傳活動通常意味著一個又一個的高級定制與主題造型。但在她最新一站的“蜘蛛人：全新的一天(Spider-Man: Brand New Day)”世界巡演中，於週三在巴黎，這位艾美獎得主穿著一件簡單的超大黑色T恤，前面印有蜘蛛人的圖案。

當然，Zendaya和她的長期造型師Law Roach(勞·羅奇)將這件復古圖案T恤搭配了白色的Christian Louboutin(基督山)高跟鞋——畢竟這是一個紅毯攝影會——但真正的新聞是，Roach在eBay上以34.99美元的價格購得了這件衣服。

“風格不一定要花費一大筆錢，”Roach在他的Instagram故事中寫道，並發布了這件T恤的eBay列表截圖。（賣掉那件二手2XL T恤的人可能無法相信它最終落在了誰的超時尚背上。）

多年來，Zendaya和Roach創造了許多紅毯時尚瞬間，包括在2019年於Met Gala上讓Zendaya變身為灰姑娘的Tommy Hilfiger(湯米·希爾費格)長裙；為《沙丘：第二部分(Dune: Part Two)》首映會尋找了一件緊身金屬Thierry Mugler(蒂埃里·穆勒)連身衣（95年秋冬）；為《挑戰者(Challengers)》準備的一系列網球風格服裝，包括定制的Loewe(羅意威)和Lacoste(拉科斯特)造型；以及過去十年中四部《蜘蛛人(Spider-Man)》電影的許多蜘蛛網裝飾風格。

最近，這對搭檔為她的婚禮喜劇《戲劇(The Drama)》講述了一個婚禮主題的故事——重用Zendaya在2015年奧斯卡頒獎典禮上首次穿著的白色Vivienne Westwood(薇薇安·韋斯特伍德)長裙作為“舊物”，並以一件剛從秀場走出的黑藍色羽毛Schiaparelli(夏帕雷利)舞會裙作為“藍物”作結。Zendaya和她的“蜘蛛人”湯姆·霍蘭德(Tom Holland)在此期間也結婚了，但這對超時尚且極為私密的夫妻在走入婚姻殿堂時穿了什麼，世界可能永遠無法得知。

Zendaya在馬德里啟動了“全新的一天(Brand New Day)”宣傳之旅，穿著一件火紅的Ernest Naranjo(厄尼斯特·納蘭霍)裙子和一件黑色Christian Cowan(克里斯蒂安·考恩)長裙。在阿姆斯特丹，她選擇了一件戲劇性的McQueen(亞歷山大·麥昆)歌劇外套和帶有金屬花卉刺繡的裙子，以及一套黑紅相間的Louis Vuitton(路易威登)造型。然後，在柏林，她穿著定制的黑色皮革Louis Vuitton短上衣和裙子。對於羅馬，Zendaya選擇了檔案風格，穿著一件來自Giorgio Armani(喬治·阿瑪尼)的驚艷珠飾蜘蛛網裙（90年春季）和一件閃亮的Versace(范思哲)短上衣和裙子（97年秋季）。

這部電影由Sony(索尼)和Marvel Studios(漫威影業)製作，湯姆·霍蘭德和Zendaya主演，將於7月31日在美國影院上映。
summary_zh:
由安潔莉克·傑克森(Angelique Jackson)報導

Zendaya(辛黛拉)的宣傳活動通常意味著一個又一個的高級定制與主題造型。但在她最新一站的“蜘蛛人：全新的一天(Spider-Man: Brand New Day)”世界巡演中，於週三在巴黎，這位艾美獎得主穿著一件簡單的超大黑色T恤，前面印有蜘蛛人的圖案。
